_meta.remediationNotes: P0/P1 QA remediation applied. Added reset, layout, theme, icon sections. Deprecated shorthand color aliases documented. Phantom token marked reserved.

layers.name: primitive
layers.description: Raw values: colors, sizes, typography scales, icon data-URIs, filter values

layers.name: semantic
layers.description: Contextual aliases: what a value means, not what it is

layers.name: component
layers.description: Component-specific overrides, scoped to a single component

layers.name: layout
layers.description: Structural layout tokens: max-width, gaps, paddings

layers.name: reset
layers.description: Base browser reset defaults wired to semantic tokens

layers.name: theme
layers.description: Architectural configuration tokens: focus, radius, border

_meta.p1Note: P1-A/B: status and layer fields added to all tokens.

--primitive-color-cyan-500.note: Cyan hue at L=0.60, from runtime CSS.

--primitive-color-cyan-200.note: Cyan hue at L=0.88, for tints.

--primitive-font-family-inter.note: Inter font family stack for UI use.

--primitive-icon-arrow-default.note: SVG data-URI for default arrow icon.

--primitive-icon-arrow-double.note: SVG data-URI for double arrow icon.

--primitive-icon-rrss-email.note: SVG data-URI for email social icon.

--primitive-icon-ui-cancel.note: SVG data-URI for cancel/close UI icon.

--primitive-icon-ui-exclamation.note: SVG data-URI for exclamation UI icon.

--primitive-icon-ui-home.note: SVG data-URI for home UI icon.

--primitive-icon-ui-tick.note: SVG data-URI for tick/checkmark UI icon.

--primitive-filter-brown.note: CSS filter to colorize SVG icons to brown.

--primitive-filter-blue.note: CSS filter to colorize SVG icons to blue.

--primitive-filter-success.note: CSS filter to colorize SVG icons to success green.

--primitive-filter-error.note: CSS filter to colorize SVG icons to error red.

--primitive-filter-warning.note: CSS filter to colorize SVG icons to warning yellow.

--primitive-filter-disabled.note: CSS filter to colorize SVG icons to disabled gray.

--semantic-filter-primary.value: brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(18%) sepia(47%) saturate(1200%) hue-rotate(228deg) brightness(95%) contrast(95%)
--semantic-filter-primary.rawValue: brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(18%) sepia(47%) saturate(1200%) hue-rotate(228deg) brightness(95%) contrast(95%)

--semantic-filter-secondary.value: brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(42%) sepia(95%) saturate(1200%) hue-rotate(313deg) brightness(105%) contrast(101%)
--semantic-filter-secondary.rawValue: brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(42%) sepia(95%) saturate(1200%) hue-rotate(313deg) brightness(105%) contrast(101%)

--semantic-filter-state-ok.value: brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(28%) sepia(80%) saturate(800%) hue-rotate(100deg) brightness(95%) contrast(95%)
--semantic-filter-state-ok.rawValue: brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(28%) sepia(80%) saturate(800%) hue-rotate(100deg) brightness(95%) contrast(95%)

--semantic-filter-state-ko.value: brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(22%) sepia(60%) saturate(900%) hue-rotate(340deg) brightness(90%) contrast(95%)
--semantic-filter-state-ko.rawValue: brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(22%) sepia(60%) saturate(900%) hue-rotate(340deg) brightness(90%) contrast(95%)

--semantic-filter-state-warning.value: brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(70%) sepia(80%) saturate(600%) hue-rotate(20deg) brightness(105%) contrast(95%)
--semantic-filter-state-warning.rawValue: brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(70%) sepia(80%) saturate(600%) hue-rotate(20deg) brightness(105%) contrast(95%)

--semantic-border-focus.note: Focus ring border color. Used in :focus states.

--semantic-focus-ring-color.note: Focus ring color for keyboard accessibility.

--semantic-font-weight-black.note: Semantic alias for black (900) font weight.

--semantic-color-text-on-primary.note: Text color on primary background (contrast pair).

--component-form-field-min-height.note: Shared baseline height for inputs, selects, and similar controls (48px)

--reset-html-font.note: Default font shorthand applied to the html element.

--reset-body-color.note: Default text color for body element.

--reset-body-background-color.note: Default background color for body element.

--reset-body-font-size.note: Default font size for body element.

--reset-h-font-family.note: Font family applied to all heading elements (h1–h6).

--layout-max-width.note: Maximum content width. Override per theme. Defaults to inherit (no cap).

--theme-focus.note: Architectural theme token for focus shadow. Used to configure the global focus style.

--theme-radius.note: Architectural theme token for global border radius. Override per theme.

--theme-w-border.note: Architectural theme token for a thin decorative border width.

--theme-focus-ring-width.note: Width of the global focus ring outline.

--icon-arrow-default.note: Semantic icon alias for default arrow. Points to primitive SVG data-URI.

--icon-arrow-double.note: Semantic icon alias for double arrow.

--icon-content-bars.note: Semantic icon alias for hamburger/bars icon.

--icon-user-interface-cancel.note: Semantic icon alias for cancel icon.

--icon-user-interface-exclamation-mark.note: Semantic icon alias for exclamation icon.

--icon-user-interface-home.note: Semantic icon alias for home icon.

--icon-user-interface-tick.note: Semantic icon alias for tick icon.
